reading.title: Woman Down
reading.author: Colleen Hoover
reading.blurb: Colleen Hoover's twisty 2026 thriller — a burned-out novelist hides away at a remote lake cabin to write her next book, and after meeting a local detective the line between her fiction and real life starts to blur.

menu_coffee.name: Daily Bread
menu_coffee.description: Our freshly brewed house blend — simple, dependable, and always there when you need it. Just like daily grace. Bottomless refills available.
menu_coffee.verse: “Give us this day our daily bread.” — Matt. 6:11

menu_coffee.name: Living Water Latte
menu_coffee.description: Smooth espresso and steamed milk — silky, nourishing, and never runs dry. The perfect everyday cup. Choose from whole, oat, or almond milk.
menu_coffee.verse: “Whoever drinks the water I give them will never thirst.” — John 4:14

menu_coffee.name: Crowned with Glory
menu_coffee.description: Equal parts espresso, steamed milk, and a thick, velvety crown of foam. Bold beneath and light on top — just as we are called to be.
menu_coffee.verse: “You crown the year with your bounty.” — Ps. 65:11

menu_coffee.name: Mocha at Midnight
menu_coffee.description: Espresso with rich chocolate, steamed milk, and a swirl of whipped cream. A reminder that even in the darkest hour, something sweet is waiting.
menu_coffee.verse: “His song is with me in the night.” — Ps. 42:8

menu_coffee.name: Patient Endurance
menu_coffee.description: Steeped slowly for 18–24 hours — smooth, low-acid, and worth every minute of the wait. A cup that could only be made through patience.
menu_coffee.verse: “Let patience have its perfect work.” — James 1:4

menu_tea.name: Morning Mercies
menu_tea.description: A rich, malty blend to start your day anchored in gratitude. Served with honey and your choice of milk — simple, dependable, and deeply comforting.
menu_tea.verse: “His mercies are new every morning.” — Lam. 3:23

menu_tea.name: The Anointed Cup
menu_tea.description: Classic black tea lifted with bergamot's bright citrus note — elegant, fragrant, and like a moment set apart. Wonderful hot or iced.
menu_tea.verse: “You anoint my head with oil; my cup overflows.” — Ps. 23:5

menu_tea.name: Armor of God Chai
menu_tea.description: Bold black tea with cinnamon, cardamom, ginger, cloves, and pepper — as strong and layered as the armor we put on each day. Steamed with oat or whole milk.
menu_tea.verse: “Put on the full armor of God.” — Eph. 6:11

menu_tea.name: Fruit of the Spirit
menu_tea.description: A radiant blend of hibiscus, rosehip, and mixed berries — tart, bright, and full of life. Gorgeous hot or iced with a sprig of mint.
menu_tea.verse: “The fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace…” — Gal. 5:22

menu_tea.name: Light of the World Matcha
menu_tea.description: Vibrant, earthy ceremonial matcha whisked with steamed milk and a whisper of honey. Bold in color, rich in flavor — a cup as bright as the light we carry.
menu_tea.verse: “You are the light of the world.” — Matt. 5:14

picks.title: Rooms
picks.author: James Rubart
picks.blurb: On a rainy spring day in Seattle, young software tycoon Micah Taylor receives a cryptic twenty-five-year-old letter from a great-uncle he never knew. The letter claims a home awaits him on the Oregon coast that will turn his world upside down. Suspecting a prank, Micah arrives to discover a stunning new house. But when bizarre things begin happening in its rooms, he learns the home is far more than a house—it is a physical manifestation of his soul. As Micah confronts painful truths from his past, God uses the house to heal his deepest wounds and lead him toward an astonishing new destiny.

picks.title: Edge-of-Your-Seat Reads

picks.blurb: The shelf that keeps regulars coming back — fast, fun, hard to put down.
